sizing_rule.note: Add contracts at each $1,000 profit level as trade progresses. Each add-on treated as independent system. Position size optimized as function of current account equity. This is anti-martingale (pyramiding into winners) with Optimal-F philosophy, but exact sizing formula not specified in excerpt.

source_rule_text: Add more contracts as the trade progresses through fixed profit levels ($1,000 increments), treating each add-on as a separate market system, with position size optimized as a function of account equity level.
